title: bromus hordeaceus var. simplicissimus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. simplicissimus, also known as downy brome or Japanese brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus var. simplicissimus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
